name: phase7_baseline_validation
description: Systematic falsification protocol: 28 families; C1/C2/C3/C4 full coverage

pytorch.reason: Core substrate: all 28 torch modules, autograd gradients, graph topology tests

overall_verdict.interpretation: 16 families show substrate sensitivity. PyTorch provides value beyond numpy for: z_dephasing, x_dephasing, depolarizing, amplitude_damping, phase_damping, bit_flip, phase_flip, bit_phase_flip, unitary_rotation, CNOT, CZ, SWAP, iSWAP, cartan_kak, husimi_q, quantum_discord. C2 graph-topology coverage is complete, with the remaining-family expansion merged from sim_c2_topology_remaining.py. Structural features: 1q families overrepresented.
